holdings.infoBox: SSXU is an equity ETF with a total of 13 individual holdings. The top holdings are Franklin FTSE Japan ETF stock at 21.07%, iShares MSCI China ETF at 13.17%, Franklin FTSE Canada ETF at 12.34%, Franklin FTSE United Kingdom ETF at 9.71%, and iShares MSCI Philippines ETF at 6.98%.

overview.description: The Strategy Shares Day Hagan Smart Sector International ETF (SSXU) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in total market equity. The fund is an actively managed equity fund-of-funds that aims to outperform its benchmark by over and underweighting geographic regions outside of the US. SSXU was launched on Jul 1, 2022 and is issued by Day Hagan.
